name: autobeat

scripts.test:
echo '
⚠️  WARNING: Running full test suite crashes Claude Code instances!

✅ Safe commands (run these from Claude Code):
   npm run test:core
   npm run test:handlers
   npm run test:repositories
   npm run test:adapters
   npm run test:implementations
   npm run test:services
   npm run test:cli
   npm run test:dashboard
   npm run test:integration

❌ Full suite: Use npm run test:all (only in local terminal/CI)
' && exit 1
scripts.test:all: npm run test:core && npm run test:handlers && npm run test:services && npm run test:repositories && npm run test:adapters && npm run test:implementations && npm run test:cli && npm run test:dashboard && npm run test:scheduling && npm run test:checkpoints && npm run test:error-scenarios && npm run test:orchestration && npm run test:translation && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:services: NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=2048' vitest run tests/unit/services/judge-exit-condition-evaluator.test.ts tests/unit/services/task-manager.test.ts tests/unit/services/recovery-manager.test.ts tests/unit/services/process-connector.test.ts tests/unit/services/handler-setup.test.ts tests/unit/services/loop-manager.test.ts tests/unit/services/eval-batch3.test.ts tests/unit/services/eval-batch3-mcp.test.ts tests/unit/services/eval-domain-batch2.test.ts tests/unit/services/schedule-executor-autostart.test.ts tests/unit/services/schedule-executor-pure-fns.test.ts tests/unit/services/eval-task-waiter.test.ts --no-file-parallelism
scripts.test:full: npm run test:all && npm run test:worker-handler
scripts.test:cli: NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=2048' vitest run tests/unit/cli.test.ts tests/unit/cli-init.test.ts tests/unit/cli-services.test.ts tests/unit/retry-functionality.test.ts tests/unit/read-only-context.test.ts --no-file-parallelism
scripts.test:coverage: NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=2048' npm run test:unit -- --coverage && NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=2048' npm run test:integration -- --coverage
scripts.test:audit: echo 'Run /audit-tests command in Claude for full audit'
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist src/generated logs test-logs test-db tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run check && npm run build && npm run test:all
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && test -f dist/cli.js || (echo 'ERROR: dist/cli.js missing - build failed silently' && exit 1)
scripts.release:check-index: bash -c 'diff <(ls docs/releases/RELEASE_NOTES_v*.md | sed "s|.*/RELEASE_NOTES_||;s|\.md||" | sort -V) <(grep -oE "v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+" docs/releases/RELEASE_NOTES.md | sort -V | uniq)'

author: dean0x
description: AI coding agent orchestration at scale. Karpathy optimization loops, multi-agent pipelines, DAG dependencies, autoscaling workers. Claude, Codex, Gemini.
